name: Samuro
description: A stealthed Assassin that's great at capturing Mercenary camps and is difficult to kill.
title: The Blademaster
info: Samuro, the last remaining blademaster to wear the banner of the Burning Blade, is on a warrior's pilgrimage in search of vengeance and redemption for his fallen clan. It will be a long journey, but he has sworn an oath to restore his clan's honor.

Samuro.name: Mirror Image
Samuro.description: Teleport a short distance in the direction of the mouse cursor, creating 2 Mirror Image in the opposite direction with as much Health as Samuro, each dealing 11 (+4% per level) damage with their Basic Attacks. Whenever an Image takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.  Mirror Images last for 8 seconds, and up to 2 Mirror Images can be active at a time. Each time they or Samuro hit an enemy Hero with their Basic Attack, their duration is extended by 1 second. Using Mirror Image removes most negative effects from Samuro.

Samuro.name: Critical Strike
Samuro.description: Activate to cause Samuro and his Mirror Images next Basic Attack within 8 seconds to be a Critical Strike, dealing 50% additional damage. Stealth is not broken when activated.  Passive: Samuro and his Images also deal a Critical Strike every 4th Basic Attack.

Samuro.name: Wind Walk
Samuro.description: Grant Samuro Stealth for up to 10 seconds or until he attacks, uses an Ability, or takes damage.  While Stealthed, Samuro heals for 2% of his maximum Health every second, his Movement Speed is increased by 20% and he can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Samuro is Unrevealable for the first 1 second of Wind Walk.

Samuro.name: Bladestorm
Samuro.description: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

Samuro.name: Illusion Master
Samuro.description: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%.  Passive: Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.

Samuro.name: Select Samuro
Samuro.description: Select Samuro  Issue orders to Samuro only.

Samuro.name: Select All
Samuro.description: Select All  Issue orders to Samuro and all Mirror Images.

Samuro.name: Image Transmission
Samuro.description:
Activate to switch places with a target Mirror Image, removing most negative effects from Samuro and the Mirror Image.
**Advancing Strikes:** Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds.

1.name: Way of Illusion
1.description: Quest: Every time a Mirror Image Critically Strikes a Hero, Samuro gains 0.25 Attack Damage, up to 10.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Samuro gains an additional 30 Attack Damage.

1.name: Way of the Blade
1.description: Critical Strike now happens for Samuro and his Mirror Images every 3rd Basic Attack.  Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes from Samuro or his Mirror Images reduces their Physical Armor by 5 for 2.25 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 15 Physical Armor.

1.name: Way of the Wind
1.description: After activating or exiting Wind Walk, Samuro gains 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Activating Wind Walk instantly heals Samuro for 3% of his maximum Health.

4.name: Mirage
4.description: Mirror Image grants Samuro and his Images 40 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 40%.

4.name: One With The Wind
4.description: While Samuro has Wind Walk active and for 3 seconds after breaking it, both he and his Mirror Images gain 25 Armor, taking 25% reduced damage from all sources.

4.name: Deflection
4.description: Advancing Strikes grants Samuro and his Mirror Images 35 Physical Armor.

7.name: Burning Blade
7.description: Critical Strikes from Samuro or his Mirror Images deal bonus Spell Damage equal to 50% of their Basic Attack damage to the target and other nearby enemies.

7.name: Phantom Pain
7.description: Samuro's Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes reduce Image Transmission's cooldown by 1 second, and deal 35% more damage for each active Mirror Image.

7.name: Crushing Blows
7.description: Samuro's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce Critical Strike's cooldown by 2 seconds.  Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 4 seconds, up to 30%.

10.name: Bladestorm
10.description: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies.

10.name: Illusion Master
10.description: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%.  Passive: Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.

13.name: Mirrored Steel
13.description: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Mirror Image by 0.75 seconds.

13.name: Kawarimi
13.description: Wind Walk creates a Mirror Image at Samuro's location that will continue whatever he was doing.

13.name: Shukuchi
13.description: Wind Walk teleports Samuro a short distance in the direction he's currently facing.

16.name: Merciless Strikes
16.description: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemies are always Critical Strikes.

16.name: Harsh Winds
16.description: If Wind Walk is broken by Samuro attacking an enemy Hero, he deals 30% additional damage to that target for 3 seconds.

16.name: Press the Attack
16.description: Basic Attacks from Samuro or his Mirror Images against enemy Heroes or while Advancing Strikes is active increases their Attack Speed by 10%, up to 40%.  These bonuses are lost when losing Advancing Strikes.

20.name: Dance Of Death
20.description: Mirror Images use Bladestorm when Samuro does, but for 45% damage. If Samuro hits at least 20 enemy Heroes with Bladestorm, then reset its cooldown.

20.name: Three Blade Style
20.description: Samuro's Mirror Images only deal half of the damage they take to themselves, effectively increasing their Health by 25%, and their duration is increased to 16 seconds.

20.name: Wind Strider
20.description: Wind Walk's cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds.

20.name: Blademaster's Pursuit
20.description: Advancing Strikes grants an additional 15% Movement Speed for Samuro and his Mirror Images, and its duration is increased by 2 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.SamuroBlademastersPursuitTalent: Advancing Strikes grants an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,SamuroBlademastersPursuit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value*100" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed for Samuro and his Mirror Images, and its duration is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,SamuroBlademastersPursuit,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
